creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #9)

> The patch only changes OPTIONS_DEFAULT.

Yes, the point of the patch was to add HTTP2 and IDN support to the
curl packages build on the FreeBSD cluster and available from
pkg.freebsd.org.  What more should it do?

> The situation was not changed since my last comment (Comment #2).

Very true.

> I'm waiting for more patches from the submitter.

I will not be submitting more patches for this.
